---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, command, or skill
labels: enhancement
---

## What FastAPI problem does this solve?

Describe the specific situation where you'd use this. Be concrete.
e.g. "When I add a Celery task I always forget to handle retry logic and dead-letter queues"

## What type of addition?

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New command
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing agent/command/skill
- [ ] Example app addition

## Proposed name

e.g. `celery-task-architect`, `/review-background-tasks`

## What should the output look like?

Sketch the output format — what sections, what information, what verdict.

## Why now?

Is this blocking you on a current project? Part of a v2 idea? Just a good idea?
